hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"Compass reminder (advisory — this hook cannot write for you and compaction cannot be deferred): if a Compass build is active, the safety net is per-step discipline — progress.md should already be fresh after the last completed step, and no plan.md box should be checked whose verify did not finish. Before continuing, update .claude/builds/<slug>/progress.md (stage, status, first UNCHECKED step, open ledger items) and print the Compass resume block for /compass:resume."}'
